title: The Woman in Room 13
writer: Max Marcin, Richard Schayer, Samuel Shipman
actors: Pauline Frederick, Charles Clary, John Bowers
plot: Laura Bruce is married to John Bruce, police commissioner. She discovers her husband is enjoying a drunken revel with another woman, and vows she will obtain a divorce. After doing so she weds Paul Ramsey. His employer, Dick Turne...
